items.title: Amazon EC2 M8a instances now available in the Asia Pacific (Hyderabad) region

items.title: AWS Network Load Balancer now supports Listener Rules for custom traffic routing
items.snippet: Network Load Balancer (NLB) now supports listener rules allowing you to route connections to different target groups based on the source IP address type. With listener rules, a single dual-stack NLB sends IPv6 client traffic to IPv6 targets and IPv4 client…

items.title: AWS Entity Resolution now supports advanced real-time matching
items.snippet: AWS Entity Resolution now supports real-time matching with advanced matching workflows, enabling customers to match records in milliseconds using complex rulesets through the GenerateMatchId API. Previously, real-time matching was limited to simple rule-based…

items.title: AWS Lambda durable functions now supports customer managed key encryption
items.snippet: AWS Lambda durable functions now supports encryption of durable execution data with an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Lambda durable functions lets you build long-running, reliable workflows directly in your Lambda function code…
